risk_title: Security Risk Screening in Conflict-Prone Areas Not Implemented
risk_summary: Projects in conflict-prone areas are required to undergo security risk screening and develop security management plans, but implementation status shows this requirement has not yet been operationalized, creating a gap in FCV risk management for electrification activities in vulnerable regions.
evidence_quote: Prevention and management of social conflict... At all levels, all projects in conflict-prone areas will pass on security risk screening and sufficient community consultations *All projects in conflict-prone areas have security risk assessment & SMP Comments Not Implemented

risk_title: Mini-Grid Infrastructure Damaged by Environmental Hazards in Fragile Regions
risk_summary: Mini-grid installations in Somali and other fragile regions are experiencing operational failures due to environmental damage and technical issues, indicating vulnerability of electrification infrastructure in conflict-affected areas and potential service disruption risks.
evidence_quote: The recent verification by ESS found that the mini grids in Kusrewad and Behima are non-functional. In Kusrewad, high winds damaged the powerhouse, and in Behima, battery depletion rendered the system inoperable.

risk_title: Political and Governance Risk Rated High
risk_summary: The systematic risk assessment identifies Political and Governance as a High risk category, indicating underlying governance fragility or political instability affecting project implementation environment.
